---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement that fits NullKeys
title: "[Feature]: "
labels:
  - enhancement
---

## Problem or opportunity

What problem would this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature, workflow, or improvement.

## Why it fits NullKeys

- How does this preserve the local-first, privacy-first model?
- Would it require accounts, remote sync, telemetry, or a backend dependency?
- If it changes product direction, why is the tradeoff worth it?

## User workflow

Describe the intended flow.

## Alternatives considered

List alternative approaches or why the current behavior is insufficient.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, references, or related issues if useful.
